required_contains.text: - **Yuma Consensus** — on-chain settlement that turns validator weights into emission shares.
Staking and liquidity provision name support paths; Yuma processes validator weights into rewards

forbidden_contains.text: Yuma Consensus is the separate mechanism that converts validator weight submissions into emission
shares each tempo rather than from pool swap volume or stake moves alone
Both paths can involve alpha and TAO, but they answer different participation questions. Yuma still
settles from evaluation signals validators submit as weights on the relevant netuid
